title: Thérèse Raquin
writer: Émile Zola, Fanny Carlsen, Willy Haas
actors: Gina Manès, Hans Adalbert Schlettow, Jeanne Marie-Laurent
plot: Thérèse Raquin (Gina Manès), an unhappily married woman , aided by her lover Laurent (Hans Adalbert Schlettow), drowns her husband Michaud (Charles Barrois) only to find the guilt of her sin is intolerable.
